name_cn:
White·
SOLFERINO BOX_19cm
A best-seller that conquered the fashion world before it even launched. Inspired by the Parisian street Rue De Solferino, this bag features original fine pin-stripe Box calfskin with excellent texture and flexibility. The interior features a three-panel accordion pocket for daily essentials. The newly designed 'L' letter clasp opens vertically, completely redefining your perception of bag closures—simply too fun!
Model: 634306
Size: 19x13x5cm
